entries.match: 所有功能尽在 Microsoft Accounts
entries.en: All features are available with a Microsoft account
entries.tn: Dikarolo tsotlhe di gona ka akhaonto ya Microsoft

entries.match: Login后，即可在设备上使用你最喜爱的 Microsoft Apps和服务。可以备份设备、让设备更安全，并使用 Microsoft 365 Apps版和云储存空间。
entries.en: After signing in, use your favorite Microsoft apps and services on this device. Back up your device, make it safer, and use Microsoft 365 apps and cloud storage.
entries.tn: Morago ga go tsena, dirisa di-app le ditirelo tsa Microsoft tse o di ratang mo sediriswng se. Boloka sediriswa sa gago, se dire se sireletsegile, mme o dirise di-app tsa Microsoft 365 le polokelo ya leru.
Dipeakanyo tse di sa tswang go dirisiwa le tse di dirisiwang gantsi
Laola tshedimosetso le data ya gago
Beya mmala wa kgatelelo wa Windows

entries.match: 为焦点窗口开启 Mica 效果
entries.en: Enable Mica effects for the focused window
entries.tn: Dirisa diphetogo tsa Mica mo lefesetereng le le diragalang
Laola, oketsa, le go ntsha didiriswa

entries.match: 显示器、亮度、夜间模式、显示描述
entries.en: Displays, brightness, night light, and display profile
entries.tn: Dingwaeng, phatsimo, lesedi la bosigo, le porofaele ya pontsho

entries.match: 声音级别、输入、输出、声音设备
entries.en: Volume levels, input, output, and sound devices
entries.tn: Maemo a modumo, tsenyo, ntsho, le didiriswa tsa modumo
Ditemoso go tswa mo sistemeng le di-app

entries.match: 睡眠、电池使用情况、节电模式
entries.en: Sleep, battery usage, and battery saver
entries.tn: Boroko, tiriso ya betri, le mongolodi wa betri

entries.match: 存储空间、驱动器、配置规则
entries.en: Storage space, drives, and configuration rules
entries.tn: Sebaka sa polokelo, di-drive, le melao ya thulaganyo
Go dira ditiro di le dintsi

entries.match: 贴靠窗口、桌面、任务切换
entries.en: Snap windows, desktops, and task switching
entries.tn: Go kgomaretsa mafesetere, di-desktop, le go fetola ditiro

entries.match: 激活状态、订阅、产品密钥
entries.tn: Maemo a tshwetso, dipeeletso, senotlelo sa setlhagiswa

entries.match: 建议的疑难解答、首选项和历史记录
entries.tn: Batharabolodi ba ba atlenegisitsweng, dikgetho le hisetori
Seta sesha, tshimologo e e kwa godimo, boela morago

entries.match: 权限、配对 PIN、可发现性
entries.tn: Ditetla, PIN ya go kopanya, go bonwa

entries.match: 远程桌面用户、连接权限
entries.tn: Badirisi ba Desktop ya kgakala, ditetla tsa kgolagano

entries.match: 剪贴和复制历史记录、同步、清除
entries.tn: Hisetori ya clipboard, tsamaisano, le go phimola

entries.match: 设备规格、重命名电脑、Windows 规格
entries.en: Device specifications, rename PC, Windows specifications
entries.tn: Ditlhalosi tsa sediriswa, reetsa PC leina, ditlhalosi tsa Windows

entries.match: 这是您在其他设备的Bluetooth列表中的名称
entries.en: This is your name in other devices' Bluetooth lists
entries.tn: Le ke leina la gago mo dilenaaneng tsa Bluetooth tsa didiriswa tse dingwe
Batla didiriswa tse disha tsa Bluetooth

entries.en: Bluetooth mice, keyboards, and other Bluetooth devices
entries.tn: Dimaose tsa Bluetooth, dikeyboard, le didiriswa tse dingwe tsa Bluetooth

entries.en: Access mobile devices from your PC instantly
entries.tn: Fitlhelela didiriswa tsa selangwana go tswa mo PC ka bonako
Go tobetsa, go skrolla, go godisa, le ditshupo

entries.en: Set up your pen, set up your touchscreen
entries.tn: Rulaganya pene ya gago, rulaganya skrine sa go ama
Dikitsiso le mongolodi wa maatla wa USB
Golaganya, laola marang-rang a a golagantsweng
Marang-rang a selangwana ga a a golaganngwa

entries.en: Access the internet via mobile network
entries.tn: Fitlhelela inthanete ka marang-rang a selangwana
Abelana kgolagano ya gago ya inthanete
Emisa puisano e e se nang dithapo

entries.match: 用于 WI-Fi 和以太网的代理服务器
entries.en: Proxy server for Wi-Fi and Ethernet
entries.tn: Seva ya proxy ya Wi-Fi le Ethernet

entries.en: Set up a dial-up internet connection
entries.tn: Rulaganya kgolagano ya inthanete ya dial-up
Dipeakanyo tsa marang-rang tse di kwa godimo

entries.match: 查看所有网络适配器、网络重置
entries.en: View all network adapters, network reset
entries.tn: Bona di-adapter tsotlhe tsa marang-rang, go seta marang-rang sesha

entries.match: 已安装的Apps程序、Apps程序执行别名
entries.tn: Di-app tse di tsentsweng, maina a mangwe a go dirisa di-app

entries.match: 文件和链接类型的默认值，其他默认值
entries.en: Defaults for file and link types, other defaults
entries.tn: Dikgetho tsa semelo tsa mefuta ya faele le kgolagano, dikgetho tse dingwe
Di-download, lefelo la polokelo, dintšhafatso tsa dimmapa

entries.match: 为您的设备提供额外功能
entries.en: Provide extra features for your device
entries.tn: Neela sediriswa sa gago dikarolo tse dingwe

entries.match: 可以在Apps程序而不是浏览器中打开的网站
entries.en: Websites that can open in an app instead of a browser
entries.tn: Diwebsaete tse di ka bulwang mo app go na le mo sebading

entries.match: 视频格式调整、HDR 流媒体、电池选项
entries.en: Video format adjustment, HDR streaming, battery options
entries.tn: Tokafatso ya sebopego sa bidio, HDR streaming, dikgetho tsa betri

entries.en: Apps that start automatically when you sign in
entries.tn: Di-app tse di simologang ka boyona fa o tsena

entries.match: 电子邮件、日历和联系人使用的帐户
entries.en: Accounts used by email, calendar, and contacts
entries.tn: Diakhaonto tse di dirisiwang ke imeile, khalendara, le bagolagani

entries.en: Windows Hello, security key, password, dynamic lock
entries.tn: Windows Hello, senotlelo sa tshireletso, phasewete, dynamic lock

entries.match: 管理您的家庭群组、编辑帐户类型和设备权限
entries.en: Manage your family group, edit account types and device permissions
entries.tn: Laola setlhopha sa lelapa la gago, fetola mefuta ya diakhaonto le ditetla tsa didiriswa

entries.match: 备份您的文件、Apps程序、首选项以跨设备恢复它们
entries.en: Back up your files, apps, and preferences to restore them across devices
entries.tn: Boloka difaele, di-app, le dikgetho tsa gago go di busetsa mo didiriswng tsotlhe

entries.match: 设备访问、工作或学校用户、信息亭分配的访问
entries.en: Device access, work or school users, kiosk assigned access
entries.tn: Phitlhelelo ya sediriswa, badirisi ba tiro kgotsa sekolo, phitlhelelo e e abetsweng kiosk
Tsena ka akhaonto ya tiro kgotsa sekolo

entries.match: 电子邮件、Apps程序和网络等组织资源
entries.en: Organization resources like email, apps, and network
entries.tn: Didirisiwa tsa mokgatlho tse di jaaka imeile, di-app, le marang-rang

entries.match: 时区、自动时钟Settings、日历显示
entries.en: Time zone, automatic clock settings, calendar display
entries.tn: Sebaka sa nako, dipeakanyo tsa watšhe tsa boitiriso, pontsho ya khalendara

entries.match: Windows 和某些Apps程序根据您所在的地区Settings日期和时间的格式
entries.en: Windows and some apps format dates and times based on your region
entries.tn: Windows le di-app dingwe di baakanya sebopego sa matlha le dinako go ya ka kgaolo ya gago

entries.match: 触摸键盘、文本建议、首选项
entries.tn: Keyboard ya go ama, dikatlenegiso tsa mafoko, dikgetho

entries.match: 语音语言、语音识别麦克风Settings、声音
entries.en: Speech language, speech recognition microphone setup, voices
entries.tn: Puo ya molomo, go rulaganya maekrofounu ya temogo ya puo, mantswe

entries.match: 控制器和键盘快捷方式

entries.tn: Lefelo la go boloka, dikgetho tsa go rekota
Tokafatsa PC ya gago go tshameka sentle

entries.match: 这将清除用户自定义的所有图标
entries.en: This will clear all user-customized icons
entries.tn: Se se tla phimola dichwantsho tsotlhe tse di itlhophetsweng ke modirisi

entries.en: Add or remove a GitHub Access Token
entries.tn: Oketsa kgotsa go ntsha GitHub Access Token

entries.match: 您可以在这里填入您的 Github Access Token 来提高 Github API 限制访问次数，即可以更好地使用 Windows Update、主题等功能。您的 Token 仅会存放在本地浏览器中，该数据不会传输至服务端，也更不会外泄，但请您妥善保管好自己的 Token。
entries.en: You can enter your GitHub Access Token here to raise the GitHub API rate limit, so features like Windows Update and themes work better. Your token is stored only in your local browser; it is not sent to any server or leaked, but please keep it safe.
entries.tn: O ka tsenya GitHub Access Token ya gago fano go oketsa selekanyo sa GitHub API, gore dikarolo tse di jaaka Windows Update le dithim di dire botoka. Token ya gago e bolokwa fela mo sebading sa gago sa selegae; ga e romelwe kwa sereng le gone ga e senolwe, mme tsweetswee e boloke sentle.
Bona dikarolo tsa di-version tsa maloba

entries.match: 当更新或System出现问题，使用此项Downloads最新完整内容
entries.en: When an update or the system has problems, use this to download the latest full content
entries.tn: Fa go na le bothata jwa ntšhafatso kgotsa sisteme, dirisa se go laisa diteng tse di feletseng tse di ntšhwa

entries.en: Set whether to enable automatic updates
entries.tn: Beya gore a o batla go dirisa dintšhafatso tsa boitiriso

entries.match: 获取 Windows 的预览版本，以分享有关新功能的更新和反馈
entries.en: Get preview builds of Windows to share updates and feedback on new features
entries.tn: Bona di-version tsa ponelopele tsa Windows go abelana dintšhafatso le maikutlo ka dikarolo tse disha
